title: Friendly Farm Animals
description: A simple coloring page featuring adorable farm animals that helps children learn about different animals while practicing fine motor skills and creativity.
instructions: Color each animal using your favorite colors. Try to stay inside the lines. After coloring, you can tell a story about these farm animals!

content.image: A simple farm scene with four easy-to-color animals: a smiling cow, a fluffy sheep, a happy pig, and a proud rooster. Each animal is drawn with simple outlines and minimal details, perfect for young children to color.

elements.name: Cow
elements.description: The cow has spots that you can color black, brown, or any color you like!

elements.name: Sheep
elements.description: The fluffy sheep can be colored white or light gray. You can make the face a different color!

elements.name: Pig
elements.description: Pigs are often pink, but you can color this pig any color you want!

elements.name: Rooster
elements.description: Roosters have colorful feathers. Try using red, orange, and yellow!

elements.name: Barn
elements.description: The barn in the background can be colored red with a brown roof.

learningFacts: Cows give us milk that we can drink or use to make cheese and yogurt.
Sheep grow wool that can be used to make warm clothes.
Pigs are very smart animals that can learn tricks and solve puzzles.
Roosters crow in the morning to wake up the farm.
